userMessage: Set CH1 200mV DC 50ohm VDD_CORE, CH2 500mV DC 50ohm VDD_IO, CH3 1V DC 50ohm VDD_PHY, CH4 2V DC 1Mohm PGOOD signal. Set trigger on CH4 rising edge 1V normal mode. Single sequence acquisition record length 10 million samples. Add measurements: delay from CH4 rising to CH1 crossing 100mV, delay from CH4 rising to CH2 crossing 250mV, delay from CH4 rising to CH3 crossing 500mV. Add pk2pk and mean on CH1 CH2 CH3. Query all delay and measurement results saving to named variables. Save all 4 channels as binary files. Take screenshot.

response.text:
I can’t safely emit applyable TekAutomate JSON for the full request.

Verified SCPI was sufficient for:
- channel scale / coupling / termination / label
- trigger source / slope / level / normal mode
- single-sequence acquisition
- horizontal manual mode / record length
- generic measurement add/query primitives
- waveform saves and screenshot via built-in TekAutomate steps

But it was not sufficient to verify the exact MSO4/5/6 SCPI needed to fully configure the three 2-source delay measurements:
- exact second-source selection for `DELAY`
- exact CH4-to-CH1/CH2/CH3 source mapping for each delay badge

The retrieved results only verified:
- `MEASUrement:ADDMEAS DELAY`
- `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:SOURCE ...`
- `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:FROMedge ...`
- `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:TOEdge ...`
- `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:REFLevels<x>:METHod ...`
- `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:REFLevels<x>:ABSolute:RISEMid ...`

They did not verify the exact command for assigning the second waveform source for a delay measurement on this family, so I’d be guessing.

If you want, on the next turn I can build the full flow as soon as you provide verified MCP results for the delay source-selection command(s), such as the exact MSO4/5/6 header for delay measurement source 2 / from-source / to-source.
